items.title: Closebye – “No Troubles Left At All” & “Ann Arbor”
items.summary: In 2024, Closebye caught our attention with their self-released sophomore effort, Hammer Of My Own. The New York indie rockers are back today with their first new music since then, in the form of two tracks called "No Troubles Left At All" and "Ann Arbor." The post Closebye – “No Troubles Left At All” & “Ann Arbor” appeared first on Stereogum.

items.title: Andy Cohen Claims To Be A Deadhead But Only Just Found Out Phil Lesh Was On Real Housewives In 2008
items.summary: Andy Cohen is famously a Deadhead — so much so that Dead & Company's John Mayer once had to clarify that they were not in a romantic relationship — yet somehow he was unaware that a founding member of the beloved band once made a cameo on The Real Housewives Of New York City. His son Grahame broke the news of the crossover to the Bravo host and went on the show this week to alert the public. The post Andy Cohen Claims To Be A Deadhead But Only Just Found Out Phil Lesh Was On <em>Real Housewives</em> In 2008 appeared first on Stereogum.

items.title: Lorde Marks Virgin Anniversary With XRAYS Demos And Behind-The-Scenes Photos
items.summary: Happy birthday, Virgin. Today marks one year since the release of Lorde's fourth studio album, and she's celebrating by sharing a bunch of demos, behind-the-scenes photos, and a personal essay via her newsletter. The post Lorde Marks <em>Virgin</em> Anniversary With <em>XRAYS</em> Demos And Behind-The-Scenes Photos appeared first on Stereogum.
